config-client-visual-enabled-comment: Enable or disable the client-side vegetation wind adjustment inside enabled authoritative room types. (Mod On/Off switch)
config-greenhouse-wind-mode-comment: Choose Low Wind or No Wind. Both use the same room-local wind pipeline; Low Wind uses the plant ranges below, while No Wind sets plant movement to 0%.
config-experimental-position-capacity-co: Rollback compatibility setting for version 0.17. Version 0.18 uses a dynamically sized spatial hash, so this option no longer limits or extends affected plants.
config-max-affected-plants-comment: Rollback compatibility setting for version 0.17. Version 0.18 tracks all registered managed vegetation and water cells without making water share a 128-position budget.
config-apply-greenhouses-comment: Apply the selected plant movement mode to vegetation inside Vanilla-classified greenhouses.
config-apply-cellars-comment: Apply the selected plant movement mode to vegetation inside enclosed small rooms that use Vanilla's cellar-size classification.
config-apply-rooms-comment: Apply the selected plant movement mode to vegetation inside other enclosed RoomRegistry rooms.
config-apply-crops-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to crop blocks.
config-apply-flowers-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to flower blocks.
config-apply-herbs-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to herb blocks.
config-apply-berry-bushes-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to small berry bushes and fruiting berry bushes.
config-apply-tall-plants-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to cattails, tule, papyrus, sedges, and other tall plants or reeds.
config-apply-vines-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to wild vines and vine blocks.
config-apply-fruit-tree-leaves-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to wind-enabled foliage vertices on fruit tree branch and foliage blocks.
config-restart-required: Room inspection changes apply immediately. Restart the client for other configuration changes.
config-apply-other-vegetation-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to other BlockPlant, plant-material, and leaves-material vegetation whose rendered mesh contains active Vanilla wind vertices. This includes ferns and compatible modded plants without hardcoded block names.
config-apply-grass-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to ground-cover grasses (tallgrass and *-grass-* blocks), which do not share the block types or materials of other vegetation.
config-apply-water-comment: Adjust water source-block surface movement inside enabled room types using the independent water ranges below. Water movement does not use the plant range. Only rooms already tracked for vegetation are affected.
config-greenhouse-water-wind-lower-comme: Lower simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage applied only to water source blocks in enabled greenhouses. Set equal to the upper value for fixed movement. Double-click the displayed number beside the slider to type a value.
config-greenhouse-water-wind-upper-comme: Upper simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage applied only to water source blocks in enabled greenhouses. Unequal bounds step through the range. Double-click the displayed number beside the slider to type a value.
config-cellar-water-wind-lower-comment: Lower simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage applied only to water source blocks in enabled cellars. Set equal to the upper value for fixed movement. Double-click the displayed number beside the slider to type a value.
config-cellar-water-wind-upper-comment: Upper simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage applied only to water source blocks in enabled cellars. Unequal bounds step through the range. Double-click the displayed number beside the slider to type a value.
config-room-water-wind-lower-comment: Lower simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage applied only to water source blocks in enabled normal RoomRegistry rooms. Set equal to the upper value for fixed movement. Double-click the displayed number beside the slider to type a value.
config-room-water-wind-upper-comment: Upper simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage applied only to water source blocks in enabled normal RoomRegistry rooms. Unequal bounds step through the range. Double-click the displayed number beside the slider to type a value.
config-greenhouse-wind-lower-comment: Lower simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage shared by all enabled greenhouses. Set equal to the upper value for fixed wind. Double-click the displayed number beside the slider to type a value.
config-greenhouse-wind-upper-comment: Upper simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage shared by all enabled greenhouses. Unequal bounds step upward and downward through the range. Double-click the displayed number beside the slider to type a value.
config-cellar-wind-lower-comment: Lower simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage shared by all enabled cellars. Set equal to the upper value for fixed wind. Double-click the displayed number beside the slider to type a value.
config-cellar-wind-upper-comment: Upper simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage shared by all enabled cellars. Unequal bounds step upward and downward through the range. Double-click the displayed number beside the slider to type a value.
config-room-wind-lower-comment: Lower simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage shared by all enabled normal RoomRegistry rooms. Set equal to the upper value for fixed wind. Double-click the displayed number beside the slider to type a value.
config-room-wind-upper-comment: Upper simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage shared by all enabled normal RoomRegistry rooms. Unequal bounds step upward and downward through the range. Double-click the displayed number beside the slider to type a value.
config-room-inspection-enabled-comment: Request authoritative room validation from the server and display the result locally. No vanilla debug permission is required.
config-room-inspection-legend-normal-fai: Orange — Normal room passes vanilla but fails Still Greenhouses
config-room-inspection-legend-greenhouse: Yellow — Greenhouse passes vanilla but fails Still Greenhouses
config-room-inspection-legend-cellar-fai: Pink — Cellar passes vanilla but fails Still Greenhouses
config-room-inspection-legend-normal-pas: Blue — Normal room passes both checks
config-room-inspection-legend-incomplete: Grey — Server room data is incomplete or nearby chunks are still loading
config-room-inspection-server-note: The server administrator may disable room inspection for clients.
room-inspection-disabled-by-server: Still Greenhouses room inspection has been disabled by the server administrator.
